description:
Compile a structured audit report of all complaint cases in ArkCase. Log in as 'arkcase-admin@dev.arkcase.com' (password: 'ArkCase1234!'). The report must include the status, priority, and assignees for all cases and be saved to '/home/ga/case_audit_report.txt' using the following exact format:

CASE AUDIT REPORT
=================
Generated by: arkcase-admin
Total Cases: <number>
Active Cases: <number>
Closed Cases: <number>

HIGH PRIORITY ACTIVE CASES:
- <Case Number>: <Case Title>
(Repeat for each high priority active case, or write 'None')

ALL CASES:
| Case Number | Title | Status | Priority | Assignee |
(List all cases, one per line, pipe-delimited)

Ensure all counts and details match the system exactly.
